name: Inguinal Hernia
description: An inguinal hernia involves protrusion of abdominal contents through the inguinal ring in the groin. In intact females, the uterus can herniate and become strangulated, making this a surgical emergency. Males and neutered females are less frequently affected.
symptoms: Soft swelling in the groin region
Signs of intestinal obstruction if strangulated
Vaginal swelling in females with uterine herniation
treatment_overview: Surgical repair with herniorrhaphy is required for all persistent inguinal hernias. Concurrent ovariohysterectomy is performed in intact females.
prevention_tips: Do not breed from dogs with hereditary inguinal hernia
Castration of males may reduce risk
